sqlMap.select: select count(*) from e_handleinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$ and htype=$htype$

select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id order by sf.id SEPARATOR ',') as fileids,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id SEPARATOR ',') as filenames FROM (select * from e_handleinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$ and htype=$htype$)A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id order by A.hdate desc

select count(*) from e_handleinfo_t hi LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on ct.id=hi.cdtid where hi.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
hi.htype = $htype$
ct.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
hi.htitle like '%$htitle$%'
hi.hcontent like '%$hcontent$%'

select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id order by sf.id SEPARATOR ',') as fileids,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id SEPARATOR ',') as filenames FROM (select hi.*,ct.cdtname,ct.cdtlevel from e_handleinfo_t hi LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on ct.id=hi.cdtid where hi.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
hi.htype = $htype$
ct.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
hi.htitle like '%$htitle$%'
hi.hcontent like '%$hcontent$%' )A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO e_handleinfo_t (cdtid,htype,hdate,htitle,hcontent,attachments,receivedept,receiver,hsituation,hresult,leaderlevel,approveperson,validflag,addoperatorid,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($cdtid$,$htype$,'$hdate$','$htitle$','$hcontent$','$attachments$','$receivedept$','$receiver$','$hsituation$','$hresult$','$leaderlevel$','$approveperson$',$validflag$, $addoperatorid$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE e_handleinfo_t SET validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id order by sf.id SEPARATOR ',') as fileids,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id SEPARATOR ',') as filenames FROM (SELECT * FROM e_handleinfo_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$)A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id
SELECT count(*) as nums,htype from e_handleinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$ GROUP BY htype ORDER BY htype
